model: Range Rover Velar P250 R-Dynamic SE
description:
2026 Range Rover Velar R Dynamic SE P250, 2.0L 4cyl, 4WD, 247 bhp, 8 Speed Automatic 319,00 AED or 4,998 AED / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 395 KM's - Al Tayer Warranty Valid Until 20th January 2031 Or 150,000 KM's - Al Tayer Service Contract Valid Until 20th January 2031 or 65,000 KM's - Full Service History - Comes with 2 Keys - GCC specification (Al Tayer) - Price includes VAT 
 - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Blind Spot Assist - Apple Car Play / Android Auto - Voice Command - Cruise Control - Lane Assist - Meridian Surround Sound System - Hill Descent Assist - Paddle Shifters - Bluetooth Connectivity - Memory Drivers Seat - Electronic Tailgate - Navigation System - Panoramic Sunroof - Rear View Camera - Ambient Lighting - Surround Parking Sensors - Dual Control Climate Control - 20 Inch Alloy Wheels
